category_title: Students with internalizing behaviors and low self-confidence
minimal_context: The student is asked to bring their completed example to the front of the classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please come up to the front of the class to show your example.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stays in seat and looks down) I don't want to go to the front.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just bring your paper up here.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Slowly walks up to the front of the class to show the example, keeping head down)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You finished the task. Well done.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Pulls the paper away and shrinks back, visibly distressed) No it isn't, it's all wrong.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please come up to the front of the class to show your example.

STUDENT: (Stays in seat and looks down) I don't want to go to the front.

TUTOR: Just bring your paper up here.

STUDENT: (Slowly walks up to the front of the class to show the example, keeping head down)

TUTOR: You finished the task. Well done.

STUDENT: (Pulls the paper away and shrinks back, visibly distressed) No it isn't, it's all wrong.

task.content: Receiving verbal praise ('well done') from a teacher for completing a task successfully

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When receiving verbal praise for something well done
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Lacking belief in oneself as competent and worthy of recognition

behavior_patterns.condition: When asked to present work to the class
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Would never have done that six months ago
